calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-11-2013 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-06-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend to allege a cause of action, if plaintiffs can do so in good faith, against defendant. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Melanie Gheno CSR7489.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-06-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling RE: DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. In light of the ruling sustaining the demurrer with 10 days leave to amend, the motion to strike is off calendar as moot. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Melanie Gheno CSR7489.
